---
title: "Guides"
subtitle: "Getting started, environment management, and workflow references"
---

This section collects the practical how-to documentation for this project template.

---

## Getting Started

{{< include ../guides/getting-started.md >}}

---

## Environment Management

{{< include ../guides/environment-management.md >}}

---

## Flow Usage

{{< include ../guides/flow-usage.md >}}

---

## Custom Data Guide

{{< include ../guides/custom-data-guide.md >}}

---

## Silent Mini EDA Export

{{< include ../guides/silent-mini-eda-export-guide.md >}}

---

## Command Reference

{{< include ../guides/command-reference.md >}}
